title: Mixin Creator

statement.markdown: Write a TypeScript function that allows users to create their own mixin. A mixin should have a method that prints out a greeting message with the user's name. The user should be able to add their own methods to the mixin.

constraints: The mixin function should return an object that can be used as a mixin.
The mixin function should add the user's name and methods to the mixin object.
The mixin function should return the updated mixin object.
